changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `blog_system_message` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `title` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '消息标题', `content` TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '消息内容', `creator_account` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '创建人账号', `status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态: 1-启用 0-停用', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_blog_system_message_status` (`status`, `create_time`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='系统消息表';
